providers.name: Stability AI
providers.rate_limits: 150 requests per 10 seconds (900 RPM). Exceeding this limit triggers a 429 error and a mandatory 60-second timeout.
providers.auth_notes: Requires a Stability API key. Authentication is handled via the 'Authorization' header using the Bearer token scheme (e.g., 'Authorization: Bearer sk-abc123...'). Keys are managed in the Stability AI Developer Platform dashboard.

providers.name: OpenAI (DALL-E)
providers.rate_limits: Varies by usage tier. Tier 1 (Standard) is limited to 5 images per minute (IPM) for DALL-E 3. Tier 5 allows up to 50 IPM. DALL-E 2 limits are typically 50 requests per minute (RPM).
providers.auth_notes: Uses API keys for authentication. The key must be included in the 'Authorization' header as 'Bearer OPENAI_API_KEY'. Organizations with multiple projects can also pass 'OpenAI-Organization' and 'OpenAI-Project' headers to scope requests.

providers.name: Google Cloud Imagen (Vertex AI)
providers.rate_limits: Standard quota is 20 requests per minute (RPM) for Imagen 3 models. Higher tiers or specific project approvals can increase this to 1,800 RPM for general Vision API features.
providers.auth_notes: Requires Google Cloud IAM authentication. Typically uses OAuth 2.0 access tokens generated via service accounts or the gcloud CLI ('Authorization: Bearer $(gcloud auth print-access-token)'). Project ID and Location must be specified in the request URL.

effort_recommendation.rationale: No native node - requires HTTP Request configuration
